name: Daily Medical Milking || Florence Nightingale
description:
"Please don't resist, we'll move straight to today's mana extraction. Leave it to me to ensure your continued health and happiness."

Description: Commence your daily mana extraction routine with the Head Nurse of Chaldea, Nightingale. Though her intention is ultimately good, Nightingale can be overly zealous and obsessed when it comes to saving lives and providing medical treatment, even when it's against her patients' will.

Doujinshi: Fuchou no Sakusei Ryouhou

Series: Fate/Grand Order - FGO

Artist: Zhen lu
creator: Chunter
